module.name: gantt
module.description: Simple Gantt chart ‚Äî tasks as bars over a shared time track (pure CSS grid). Body = one task per section, "Name | start end".
module.aiSpec:
A simple GANTT / schedule chart ‚Äî tasks drawn as bars on a shared timeline.
Body: split the sections with `<!-- @ -->`, one task per section written `Name | start end` ‚Äî start and end are 1-based unit numbers, inclusive (so `1 3` spans units 1 through 3). A task with start == end shows a diamond milestone. The number of columns auto-fits the latest end unless you set `units`.
When NOT to use: for dependency arrows / critical paths use @mermaid gantt; this is a lightweight roadmap view.
Parameters: - `units` : number of time-unit columns. Blank = auto (fits the latest end). Whole number >= 1. - `labels` : comma-separated column names (e.g. week names). Blank = numbers 1..n. - `color` : bar and column-header color. Default var(--accent-color). - `gap` : vertical gap between rows in px. Default 6. Range 0‚Äì40. - `barradius` : bar corner radius in px. Default 4. Range 0‚Äì20. - `barheight` : bar height in em. Default 1.5. Range 0.8‚Äì4. - `showduration` : true/false ‚Äî print the duration (unit count) inside each bar. Default false.
<!-- @gantt units: 6, labels: W1, W2, W3, W4, W5, W6, showduration: true --> Research | 1 2 <!-- @ --> Design | 2 4 <!-- @ --> Build | 3 6 <!-- @ --> Launch | 6 6 <!-- @end -->

param.name: units
param.label: Columns (time units)
param.desc: Number of time-unit columns; blank = auto (fits the latest end).

param.name: barradius
param.label: Bar radius (px)
param.desc: Corner radius of the task bars.

param.name: barheight
param.label: Bar height (em)
param.desc: Height of the task bars, in em.

param.name: showduration
param.label: Show duration
param.desc: Print the duration (unit count) inside each bar.

snippet.label: Gantt chart
snippet.text: <!-- @gantt units: 6, labels: W1, W2, W3, W4, W5, W6 --> Research | 1 2 <!-- @ --> Design | 2 4 <!-- @ --> Build | 3 6 <!-- @ --> Launch | 6 6 <!-- @end -->
snippet.description: Tasks as bars over a shared time track. "Name | start end" (1-based, inclusive).
